title: clausena anisata
intro: Clausena anisata, also known as African orange or African chamazulene, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The leaves and fruits of Clausena anisata have been traditionally used in African medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clausena anisata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Clausena anisata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its essential oil is also used in herbal preparations for its therapeutic properties.
